education.title: Education
education.university: University of New South Wales (UNSW), Sydney
education.degree: Bachelor of Computer Science (WES iGPA: 4.0/4.0, WAM: 83.5)
education.courses: Web Front-End Programming (96), Software Engineering Fundamentals (96), Computer Systems Fundamentals (87), Programming Fundamentals (85), Data Structures and Algorithms (Distinction), Object-Oriented Programming (Distinction), Software Construction: Techniques and Tools (Distinction), Extended Security Engineering and Cyber Security, Database Systems

projects.title: AI Image/Video Generation Platform
description: Built the official website for an AI image/video generation platform using Vue 3 and Nuxt 3, and pushed the features to production.
Completed the migration to MongoDB, including data cleaning, schema restructuring, and frontend consumption model design, improving page rendering and content organization efficiency.
Implemented i18n internationalization, and used Nuxt SSR for SEO optimization to improve global accessibility, search engine indexing, and first-screen loading performance.

Took features from requirement breakdown and solution design to implementation, using FastAPI + SQLAlchemy + MySQL to deliver comment features and close the loop from product idea to usable functionality.

achievements: Dockerized multimodal perception models (audio / vision / speech), reducing the cost of switching between local and server environments and improving AI application delivery efficiency.
Designed model inference APIs and service startup flows with FastAPI, supporting fast integration, validation, and business scenario adoption.

projects.title: Document Compliance Review Platform
description: Built an end-to-end document compliance review platform with FastAPI + React/Vite, covering document parsing, clause-level and full-document checks, violation annotation, and review report generation.

Designed and implemented a hybrid Rule Engine + LLM + Guardrail architecture, adding controllable constraints and output validation on top of AI generation to improve accuracy, stability, and explainability in complex compliance scenarios.

Built a RAG review pipeline using Qdrant vector search and few-shot enhancement with similar violation cases to provide dynamic grounding for the model; also refactored prompt engineering to reduce average clause-level prompt length from 15,299 to 2,918.

Designed a risk-tiered dynamic reasoning switch that enables deep reasoning only for high-risk clauses, reducing typical review time from 853s to 652s for an overall speedup of about 23.6%, reflecting technical decision-making and cost-benefit tradeoff awareness.

Built a Human-in-the-Loop feedback loop that routes reviewer labels (correct / incorrect / missed) back into the vector case library, using human review to cover AI boundaries and continuously improve false positive and false negative behavior.

achievements: Built a Discord meeting-to-task system with Next.js 15 + FastAPI + PostgreSQL, delivering the full-stack product from requirement understanding and system design to a runnable implementation.
Designed a Discord Bot to capture voice streams, connecting audio collection, speech-to-text, and LLM task generation into an automatically running intelligent workflow.

Used Prompt Engineering to extract structured tasks and perform semantic deduplication, while supporting recursive modeling and dynamic interaction for multi-level subtasks, creating a reusable AI workflow.
Used React useTransition to optimize large state updates in complex task lists, reducing UI blocking and improving product usability under high-interaction workloads.
Maintained and continuously updated the society website (https://unswaisoc.com/) to support daily operations and external presentation.

items.title: MockMate - AI Interview Training and Evaluation Platform
description: Independently delivered an AI mock interview product from frontend/backend development to production deployment, using React + FastAPI to implement the full loop of question generation -> follow-up -> answer -> AI evaluation -> record retention.

Implemented SSE-based main-question and follow-up generation for both general interviews and resume-project technical drilling, including frontend incremental rendering, non-streaming fallback, DB flushing, and local draft recovery.
Built resume parsing with strict JSON LLM extraction to convert uploaded resumes into evidence-backed project structures, enabling project-context technical questions grounded in real resume claims.

Designed a structured AI evaluation pipeline that enforces strict JSON multi-dimensional scoring and evaluates complete follow-up conversations to improve parsability, consistency, and record reusability.
Automated RSS-driven question production with APScheduler, using LLM relevance filtering before persistence to keep generated interview content focused on high-signal topics.
Built a GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline with automatic PR checks and SSH-based deployment after merge, demonstrating the ability to independently deliver a production-ready online product.

items.place: Ranked 9th across Australia and New Zealand (Top 10%)

changeSummary: Repositioned the profile from general full-stack / algorithm internship experience toward an AI application development + full-stack delivery + independent launch narrative to better match the JD's AI Native full-stack engineer requirements.

Rewrote editable project descriptions for Graviti, Cool AI, AISoc, and MockMate to emphasize end-to-end delivery, product closure, automated workflows, RAG/LLM/Guardrails, and human fallback for AI boundaries.
Kept all factual anchors unchanged, including companies, projects, dates, school, and links, while only optimizing editable text and bullet phrasing.
Added an AI-related skills group to highlight LLM application development, Prompt Engineering, RAG, Agent Workflow, Cursor, Claude Code, ChatGPT, and other highly JD-relevant capabilities.

Emphasized technical tradeoffs, performance optimization, reliability safeguards, and reusable asset creation in project descriptions, echoing the JD's preference for product judgment, requirement trimming, and reusable templating.

requiredSkills: Use AI tools in daily development
Frontend and backend full-stack development ability
Closed-loop delivery from requirements to launch
Understand AI boundaries and provide human fallback
matchNotes: The candidate has multiple verifiable projects and GitHub/Demo links, meeting the requirement for completed work and verifiable code.
The FastAPI + React/Next.js/Vue/Nuxt stack covers both frontend and backend, making the candidate suitable for AI full-stack roles.
Experience with LLM, RAG, Prompt Engineering, Guardrails, and Human-in-the-Loop aligns with AI application development scenarios.
MockMate and AISoc demonstrate delivery from requirements to deployment, automated workflow construction, and product closure.
Several experiences show awareness of AI boundaries and human fallback design, including Guardrails, feedback routing, and fallback strategies.
gapNotes: The resume does not directly provide specific project examples of using Cursor / Claude Code; these can be supplemented in interviews or additional notes.
The JD emphasizes cross-border e-commerce advertising and marketing scenarios, while the current experience does not directly map to that business domain.

The JD expects candidates to answer recent high-value work completed with AI tools, requirement-trimming examples, and specific AI failure scenarios; these are not suitable for the formal resume and should be prepared separately.
